episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 480: Final Fantasy Secret Lair Outcomes
episode.description: James and Cliff get down to business with all the latest in Magic card price movement, Modern meta analysis, cards to watch and their breakdown of the results of the Final Fantasy x MTG Secret Lair launch this week.
